creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text: We don’t push poudriere because we hate ports, we push it because it avoids triggering the kind of problem you’re reporting. Because ports allow for uncontrolled environment variation, the only way we can fix these kinds of problem is for submitters to work with us to track down the incompatibility. This is not poudriere’s fault, nor does it indicate that vim is somehow incompatible with ports.
